title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TOLOSA CENTRAL COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TOLOSA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 15913 / 65 OG No. 24, 6115 (June 16, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5340, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF TOLOSA CENTRAL COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TOLOSA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Tolosa Central Community School in the municipality of Tolosa, Province of Leyte, is hereby changed to Daniel Z. Romualdez Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 15, 1968.
